calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Ann Mendoza, CSR# 6812. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Continued To May-04-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-16-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Anthony Head, Esq., for Plaintiff: Fund Recovery Services, Inc. dba Accounts receivable Management Solutions, epresented by Ross Hawkins, the credit manager.
Timothy McGonigle, Esq., for Defendants: Michael D. Rabkin Eye Institute A Medical Group, et al., and Micchael D. Rabkin As Guarantor.
10:00 am. - Parties have settled, essential terms read into the record.
Defendant: Michael Rabkin agreed to pay the sum of $9,500.00 within 30 days, payment in the form of official's check, payable to Creditor Trade Assoc., to the attention of Mr. Head's office.
Upon full payment, Plaintiff to dismissed the action with prejudice as to all Defendants.
All parties agreed to terms, Mr. McGonigle stated that he has been authorized to settle.
Matter is place on the CRC 225 calendar for April 20, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. for DISMISSAL.
Trial date vacated.
